summary: Iteration 75 - Completed testing of supplier module improvements, pagination APIs, Zustand integration, and mobile responsiveness. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning about HTML hydration - <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is a React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> inside <span>) in Sales and Expenses pages - cosmetic issue from dynamic rendering, doesn't affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested: Add Bill dialog (supplier pre-selection, branch selector), Share Statement dialog (email/whatsapp channels), Sales/Expenses pagination APIs returning {data,total,page,limit,pages} format, Reports page handling paginated data, POS Online Sales stat showing correct value, mobile responsive headers, Zustand auth store login integration. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend tests confirmed all dialogs and data loading working correctly.
